items.title: Shedding light on sexuality in psoriatic arthritis: a 5-year prospective follow-up of an outpatient cohort.
items.abstract: To assess sexual quality of life over 5 years in patients with psoriatic arthritis, focusing on gender differences, specific domains, and the impact of health status. Patients were recruited during baseline visits in 2013. Data collection included demographics, disease activity, treatment, and patient-reported outcome measures. Sexuality was assessed using SQoL-Female (SQoL-F) questionnaire, with detailed and composite scores calculated. Item 15 of the 15D quality of life questionnaire evaluated the influence of health on sexual activity. After 5 years, patients were reinvited for follow-up with the same clinical and questionnaire data collected. Eighty-four patients with PsA with baseline and 5-year follow-up data were included (42.9% women; mean age 49.8 years; disease duration 8.9 years; 81.9% married/cohabiting). At baseline, mean DAPSA was 15.5, PASI 2.5, mean comorbidities 0.8, and 40.5% received biologic DMARDs. Over 5 years, comorbidities increased (1.0; p < 0.01), disease activity decreased (DAPSA 12.4; p = 0.03), and biologic use increased (51.2%; p = 0.04). Most men and women reported little or no impact of health on sexual activity; severe limitations were rare. Overall SQoL-F score remained stable, though women reported worse scores on items reflecting emotional concerns and sexual avoidance; total and domain scores did not differ by gender. Fatigue was the only consistent correlate of poorer SQoL-F, exceeding pain, disability, and inflammation. Over 5 years, overall SQoL in patients with PsA remained largely stable despite aging and increasing comorbidities. Women reported higher emotional and avoidance-related concerns. Fatigue, rather than pain, disability, or inflammation, consistently associated with poorer sexual well-being.

items.titleZh: 银屑病关节炎中的性生活质量：一项为期5年的门诊队列前瞻性随访研究
items.abstractZh: 评估银屑病关节炎患者5年内的性生活质量，重点关注性别差异、特定领域以及健康状况的影响。患者在2013年基线访视时被招募。数据收集包括人口统计学、疾病活动度、治疗和患者报告结局指标。使用SQoL-Female（SQoL-F）问卷评估性生活质量，计算详细和综合评分。15D生活质量问卷的第15项评估健康对性活动的影响。5年后，再次邀请患者进行随访，收集相同的临床和问卷数据。共纳入84例具有基线和5年随访数据的PsA患者（42.9%为女性；平均年龄49.8岁；病程8.9年；81.9%已婚/同居）。基线时，平均DAPSA为15.5，PASI为2.5，平均合并症数为0.8，40.5%接受生物制剂DMARDs治疗。5年间，合并症增加（1.0；p < 0.01），疾病活动度降低（DAPSA 12.4；p = 0.03），生物制剂使用增加（51.2%；p = 0.04）。大多数男性和女性报告健康对性活动影响很小或没有；严重限制罕见。总体SQoL-F评分保持稳定，尽管女性在反映情绪担忧和性回避的项目上报告更差评分；总分和领域评分无性别差异。疲劳是SQoL-F较差的唯一一致相关因素，超过疼痛、残疾和炎症。5年间，尽管年龄增长和合并症增加，PsA患者的总体SQoL基本保持稳定。女性报告更高的情绪和回避相关担忧。疲劳，而非疼痛、残疾或炎症，与较差的性健康一致相关。

items.title: Breaking and Making Tolerance: The PD-1/PD-L1 Axis in Lupus Nephritis.
items.abstract: The PD-1/PD-L1 axis is a key immune checkpoint that maintains peripheral tolerance by restraining T-cell activation. In lupus nephritis (LN), this pathway has long been viewed as protective, based on Pdcd1-deficient mice developing lupus-like nephritis and PD-L1 fusion protein efficacy in mouse models. However, recent clinical findings reveal a paradox: PD-1⁺ T cells - especially CD8⁺ and CD4⁺ subsets - are greatly expanded in blood and kidneys of LN patients, correlating with disease activity, proteinuria, and renal decline. To reconcile the protective and pathogenic roles of PD-1/PD-L1 signaling and propose a unifying "signal balance model" for precision immunomodulation. These PD-1⁺ cells are not exhausted but exhibit an activated, clonally expanded effector phenotype (granzyme B, perforin, IFN-γ) that drives tissue injury, while PD-1⁺ Tph and Tfh cells promote autoantibody production. The biphasic nature of PD-1/PD-L1 signaling arises from T-cell subset heterogeneity, inflammatory cytokines (IL-12, IFN-α) that override inhibition, costimulatory signals, and reverse signaling through PD-L1 on renal parenchymal cells. We propose that the net outcome - protection versus pathogenesis - depends on the relative weights of these four determinants, further influenced by genetic background (e.g., PDCD1 polymorphisms). PD-1 agonism (rosnilimab, PD-L1-Fc, nanoparticle delivery) offers promise, but the pathogenic activity of PD-1⁺ effector T cells argues against a uniform approach. Our framework provides a basis for patient stratification, biomarker development, and combination strategies, ultimately guiding a shift from broad immunosuppression to tailored therapy in LN and informing future translational research.

items.titleZh: 打破与建立耐受：狼疮性肾炎中的PD-1/PD-L1轴
items.abstractZh: PD-1/PD-L1轴是一个关键的免疫检查点，通过抑制T细胞活化来维持外周耐受。在狼疮性肾炎（LN）中，基于Pdcd1缺陷小鼠发展为狼疮样肾炎以及PD-L1融合蛋白在小鼠模型中的疗效，该通路长期以来被视为保护性的。然而，最近的临床发现揭示了一个悖论：PD-1⁺ T细胞——尤其是CD8⁺和CD4⁺亚群——在LN患者的血液和肾脏中显著扩增，并与疾病活动性、蛋白尿和肾功能下降相关。为了调和PD-1/PD-L1信号传导的保护性和致病性作用，并提出一个统一的“信号平衡模型”用于精准免疫调节。这些PD-1⁺细胞并未耗竭，而是表现出活化、克隆扩增的效应表型（颗粒酶B、穿孔素、IFN-γ），驱动组织损伤，而PD-1⁺ Tph和Tfh细胞促进自身抗体产生。PD-1/PD-L1信号传导的双相性质源于T细胞亚群异质性、抑制被覆盖的炎症细胞因子（IL-12、IFN-α）、共刺激信号以及通过肾实质细胞上PD-L1的反向信号传导。我们提出，最终结果——保护还是致病——取决于这四个决定因素的相对权重，并进一步受遗传背景（如PDCD1多态性）影响。PD-1激动作用（rosnilimab、PD-L1-Fc、纳米颗粒递送）具有前景，但PD-1⁺效应T细胞的致病活性反对统一的方法。我们的框架为患者分层、生物标志物开发和联合策略提供了基础，最终指导LN从广泛免疫抑制向个体化治疗的转变，并为未来的转化研究提供信息。

items.title: Deucravacitinib in Active Psoriatic Arthritis: Efficacy and Safety up to 52 Weeks From the Randomized, Double-Blind, Phase 3 POETYK PsA-2 Trial.
items.abstract: To assess the efficacy and safety of deucravacitinib, an oral, selective tyrosine kinase 2 inhibitor, in patients with psoriatic arthritis (PsA) who were naive to biologic disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs or received tumor necrosis factor inhibitors. In the 52-week (W), double-blind, placebo-controlled, phase 3 POETYK PsA-2 study (NCT04908189), patients were randomized 3:3:1 to deucravacitinib 6 mg daily, placebo, or apremilast 30 mg twice daily (safety reference arm) through W16. From W16 to W52, patients continued receiving deucravacitinib or apremilast or switched from placebo to deucravacitinib. The primary endpoint was American College of Rheumatology 20% improvement in response (ACR20) at W16. Secondary endpoints were analyzed per prespecified order to control for multiplicity. Overall, 729 patients were randomized (312 deucravacitinib, 312 placebo, 105 apremilast). Significantly more patients achieved ACR20 at W16 with deucravacitinib versus placebo (54.2% vs 39.4%; P=0.0002); responses improved beyond W16 and were maintained through W52 (deucravacitinib-deucravacitinib, 62.2%; placebo-deucravacitinib, 67.3%). At W16, significant differences with deucravacitinib versus placebo were observed in hierarchal secondary endpoints of HAQ-DI, PASI-75, SF-36 PCS, and achievement of MDA. At W16, serious adverse events occurred in 1.0%, 1.9%, and 3.8% of patients with placebo, deucravacitinib, and apremilast, respectively. No new safety signals, deaths, or imbalances in cardiovascular events, malignancies, or opportunistic infections occurred through W52. Deucravacitinib was well-tolerated in patients with PsA and demonstrated superior efficacy versus placebo across multiple clinical endpoints and patient-reported outcomes, including functional ability and quality of life. Clinical responses and patient-reported outcomes were maintained through week 52.

items.titleZh: 德卡伐替尼在活动性银屑病关节炎中的应用：来自随机、双盲、3期POETYK PsA-2试验长达52周的疗效和安全性
items.abstractZh: 评估口服选择性酪氨酸激酶2抑制剂德卡伐替尼在未使用过生物改善病情抗风湿药或曾接受肿瘤坏死因子抑制剂的银屑病关节炎（PsA）患者中的疗效和安全性。在为期52周（W）、双盲、安慰剂对照的3期POETYK PsA-2研究（NCT04908189）中，患者按3:3:1随机分配至德卡伐替尼6 mg每日一次、安慰剂或阿普斯特30 mg每日两次（安全性参考组），直至第16周。从第16周至第52周，患者继续接受德卡伐替尼或阿普斯特，或从安慰剂转为德卡伐替尼。主要终点为第16周时美国风湿病学会20%改善反应（ACR20）。次要终点按预设顺序分析以控制多重性。共729例患者被随机分配（德卡伐替尼312例，安慰剂312例，阿普斯特105例）。第16周时，德卡伐替尼组达到ACR20的患者显著多于安慰剂组（54.2% vs 39.4%；P=0.0002）；反应在第16周后改善并维持至第52周（德卡伐替尼-德卡伐替尼组62.2%，安慰剂-德卡伐替尼组67.3%）。第16周时，德卡伐替尼与安慰剂相比，在层级次要终点HAQ-DI、PASI-75、SF-36 PCS和MDA达成方面观察到显著差异。第16周时，安慰剂组、德卡伐替尼组和阿普斯特组分别有1.0%、1.9%和3.8%的患者发生严重不良事件。至第52周，未出现新的安全性信号、死亡或心血管事件、恶性肿瘤或机会性感染的不平衡。德卡伐替尼在PsA患者中耐受性良好，并在多个临床终点和患者报告结局（包括功能能力和生活质量）方面显示出优于安慰剂的疗效。临床反应和患者报告结局维持至第52周。

items.title: Correlation of Anti-Nuclear Antibody Productions With Activity and Chronicity Indexes in Lupus Nephritis: Experience at Urban-Based Tertiary Medical Center.
items.abstract: Lupus nephritis (LN) is a frequent and severe complication of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) that often necessitates invasive biopsy for definitive management. To evaluate the association between antinuclear antibody (ANA) titers, specific immunological markers, and LN pathological indexes (activity and chronicity). A retrospective observational study utilizing cross-sectional comparisons and longitudinal paired-data analysis. We analyzed 159 patients with biopsy-proven LN at an urban tertiary center (2012-2022). Two distinct analyses were performed: (1) a cross-sectional comparison between baseline SLE and LN onset, and (2) a paired longitudinal analysis of 81 individuals with available data at both time points. ANA titers remained stable between baseline SLE and LN onset (p > 0.05). However, paired analysis revealed significant anti-Smith (anti-Sm) seroconversion at LN onset (p < 0.01). High-intensity direct Coombs' tests (3+) were significantly more prevalent at LN onset (36.4% vs. 5.6%, p = 0.009). In multivariable analysis, serum creatinine was the primary factor associated with LN presentation (OR = 2.138, 95% CI 1.099-4.161, p = 0.025). While ANA titers are stable markers of SLE, they do not dynamically reflect the transition to LN. Instead, anti-Sm seroconversion and serum creatinine levels serve as more relevant markers of clinical transition.

items.titleZh: 抗核抗体产生与狼疮肾炎活动性和慢性指数相关性：城市三级医疗中心的经验
items.abstractZh: 狼疮肾炎（LN）是系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）常见且严重的并发症，通常需要侵入性活检进行明确管理。评估抗核抗体（ANA）滴度、特异性免疫标志物与LN病理指数（活动性和慢性）之间的关联。一项回顾性观察研究，采用横断面比较和纵向配对数据分析。我们分析了2012-2022年在一家城市三级中心经活检证实的159例LN患者。进行了两项不同的分析：（1）基线SLE与LN发病之间的横断面比较，以及（2）对81例在两个时间点均有可用数据的个体进行配对纵向分析。ANA滴度在基线SLE和LN发病之间保持稳定（p > 0.05）。然而，配对分析显示在LN发病时抗Smith（抗Sm）血清转换显著（p < 0.01）。高强度直接Coombs试验（3+）在LN发病时显著更常见（36.4% vs. 5.6%，p = 0.009）。在多变量分析中，血清肌酐是与LN表现相关的主要因素（OR = 2.138，95% CI 1.099-4.161，p = 0.025）。虽然ANA滴度是SLE的稳定标志物，但它们不能动态反映向LN的转变。相反，抗Sm血清转换和血清肌酐水平是更相关的临床转变标志物。

items.title: Development of An Explainable Machine Learning Model for Predicting Fatigue in Rheumatoid Arthritis.
items.abstract: Fatigue has been identified as one of the common symptoms among people who have rheumatoid arthritis (RA), which has a significant impact on their quality of life (QoL). Although fatigue has been identified as a symptom, few predictive models using clinical indicators have been developed for RA-related fatigue. This paper aims to create predictive models using machine learning (ML) algorithms. A retrospective analysis of clinical data was conducted on 271 patients with RA from two hospitals. The patients were randomly split into a training set and an external validation set. Feature selection on the training set was performed using three different algorithms: Least Absolute Shrinkage and Selection Operator (Lasso), Boruta, and Recursive Feature Elimination using a Random Forest (RF-RFE). Subsequently, multiple models using machine learning ML) techniques such as Support Vector Machine (SVM), XGBoost, LightGBM, Artificial Neural Network (ANN), K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), and Random Forest (RF) were developed. Model calibration, Receiver Operating Curve (ROC) analyses, Decision Curve Analysis (DCA), and SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) analyses were used to evaluate the models. Moreover, an overall evaluation using ten-fold cross-validation and an external evaluation using an independent dataset were undertaken. The final dataset comprised 190 patients in the training group and 81 in the external validation set, with no significant differences in demographic features such as age and sex (P > 0.05). The six important predictors identified using a variety of feature selectors were CCP, ESR, lymphocyte count, MDGA, VAS for pain, and TG. In external validation, ML model classifiers such as SVM, XGBoost, and Random Forest performed better at prediction than logistic regression. This study demonstrates the potential of ML models to capture nonlinear relationships between clinical variables when predicting fatigue in RA patients. However, the modest performance metrics suggest that these findings are preliminary. A fatigue-prediction model using routine clinical parameters was developed using ML techniques. The SVM model showed potential in identifying RA patients at risk of fatigue. However, the modest performance metrics indicate the preliminary nature of these results, necessitating validation through larger, multicenter studies.

items.title: Comparative Risk of Psoriatic Arthritis in Type 2 Diabetes: An Emulated Target Trial of SGLT2 Inhibitors vs. GLP-1 Receptor Agonists.
items.abstract: Patients with psoriatic arthritis (PsA) have a higher prevalence of type 2 diabetes mellitus (T2DM) and cardiovascular events. They also experience increased absenteeism and reduced work productivity, all of which can negatively affect both life expectancy and quality of life. We conducted this emulated target trial to compare the risk of incident PsA among patients with T2DM treated with sodium-glucose cotransporter-2 inhibitors (SGLT2i) versus those treated with glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists (GLP-1 RA). We identified 188,378 users of SGLT2 inhibitors and 213,218 users of GLP-1 receptor agonists within the TriNetX network between January 1, 2016, and December 31, 2024. Following propensity score matching, 146,810 matched pairs of SGLT2i and GLP-1 RA users were included for analysis. The primary causal estimands were the intention-to-treat (ITT) effects of the respective treatment strategies. Kaplan-Meier analysis was employed to estimate outcome probabilities, and hazard ratios (HRs) with corresponding confidence intervals (CIs) were calculated, along with tests for proportionality. In this emulated target trial, users of SGLT2i showed a significantly lower risk of developing PsA compared to users of GLP-1 RA. At 5 years of follow-up, the hazard ratio for PsA was 0.793 (95% CI, 0.667-0.944). The proportional hazards assumption was tested and met (p > 0.05). Kaplan-Meier curves further showed a significantly lower cumulative incidence of PsA among SGLT2i users compared to GLP-1 RA users (Log rank test p = 0.008). These associations remained consistent after adjusting for multiple covariates and were further supported by sensitivity analyses using a per-protocol approach. This multicenter emulated target trial found that SGLT2i use was associated with a lower risk of incident PsA compared with GLP-1 RA use. However, given the observational nature of the study and the potential for residual confounding despite extensive adjustment, these findings should be interpreted with caution. Further prospective and randomized studies are warranted to confirm this association.

items.titleZh: 2型糖尿病中银屑病关节炎的比较风险：SGLT2抑制剂与GLP-1受体激动剂的模拟目标试验
items.abstractZh: 银屑病关节炎（PsA）患者中2型糖尿病（T2DM）和心血管事件的患病率较高。他们还经历更高的缺勤率和降低的工作生产力，所有这些都可能对预期寿命和生活质量产生负面影响。我们进行了这项模拟目标试验，以比较接受钠-葡萄糖协同转运蛋白2抑制剂（SGLT2i）治疗的T2DM患者与接受胰高血糖素样肽-1受体激动剂（GLP-1 RA）治疗的患者发生新发PsA的风险。我们在TriNetX网络中识别了2016年1月1日至2024年12月31日期间的188,378名SGLT2抑制剂使用者和213,218名GLP-1受体激动剂使用者。经过倾向评分匹配后，纳入了146,810对SGLT2i和GLP-1 RA使用者进行分析。主要因果估计量是各自治疗策略的意向治疗（ITT）效应。采用Kaplan-Meier分析估计结局概率，并计算风险比（HR）及其相应的置信区间（CI），同时进行比例性检验。在这项模拟目标试验中，与GLP-1 RA使用者相比，SGLT2i使用者发生PsA的风险显著降低。在5年随访时，PsA的风险比为0.793（95% CI，0.667-0.944）。比例风险假设得到检验并满足（p > 0.05）。Kaplan-Meier曲线进一步显示，与GLP-1 RA使用者相比，SGLT2i使用者中PsA的累积发生率显著降低（Log rank检验p = 0.008）。这些关联在调整多个协变量后保持一致，并得到使用符合方案分析的敏感性分析的进一步支持。这项多中心模拟目标试验发现，与GLP-1 RA使用相比，SGLT2i使用与新发PsA风险降低相关。然而，鉴于该研究的观察性质以及尽管进行了广泛调整仍可能存在残余混杂，这些发现应谨慎解读。需要进一步的前瞻性和随机研究来确认这种关联。

items.title: Impact Of A Structured Emotional Well-Being Workshop On Psychological Outcomes And Patient Activation In Rheumatoid Arthritis And Spondyloarthritis: A Pilot Study.
items.abstract: Patients with immune-mediated inflammatory diseases, such as rheumatoid arthritis (RA) and spondyloarthritis (SpA), frequently experience psychological distress and reduced well-being despite adequate control of inflammation with biological or targeted synthetic disease-modifying antirheumatic drugs (b/tsDMARDs). Psychosocial interventions may improve emotional health and self-management, although evidence within routine multidisciplinary care remains limited. This study evaluated the impact of a structured emotional well-being workshop on psychological outcomes and patient activation in RA and SpA. We conducted a pilot study including patients with RA or SpA receiving b/tsDMARDs. Patients were invited to attend a structured emotional well-being workshop consisting of an initial face-to-face session, an eight-week online program, and a final face-to-face session. Psychological outcomes were assessed before and after the intervention using the WHO-5 Well-Being Index, the General Health Questionnaire (GHQ-12), and the Patient Activation Measure (PAM-13). Clinical outcomes included disease activity indices, physician global assessment (PhGA), patient global assessment (PGA), and pain visual analogue scale (VAS). Twenty-one patients participated. After the intervention, significant improvements were observed in PhGA and pain VAS. The frequency of moderate-to-high well-being increased from 71.4% to 95.2%, while high psychological distress decreased from 76.2% to 14.3%. Patient activation also improved, level of self-management was high in 71.4% of cases, with this percentage rising to 81.0%. In this pilot study, a structured emotional well-being workshop integrated into multidisciplinary care was associated with improved psychological well-being and patient activation in patients with RA and SpA. These findings suggest the potential value of incorporating psychosocial interventions into routine rheumatology care, although confirmation in larger controlled trials is needed.

items.titleZh: 结构化情绪健康工作坊对类风湿关节炎和脊柱关节炎患者心理结局及患者激活的影响：一项初步研究
items.abstractZh: 患有免疫介导炎症性疾病（如类风湿关节炎（RA）和脊柱关节炎（SpA））的患者，尽管使用生物制剂或靶向合成改善病情抗风湿药（b/tsDMARDs）充分控制炎症，仍常经历心理困扰和幸福感下降。心理社会干预可能改善情绪健康和自我管理，但在常规多学科护理中的证据仍然有限。本研究评估了结构化情绪健康工作坊对RA和SpA患者心理结局及患者激活的影响。我们进行了一项初步研究，纳入接受b/tsDMARDs治疗的RA或SpA患者。患者受邀参加结构化情绪健康工作坊，包括一次初始面对面会议、一个为期八周的在线项目以及一次最终面对面会议。在干预前后使用WHO-5幸福感指数、一般健康问卷（GHQ-12）和患者激活测量（PAM-13）评估心理结局。临床结局包括疾病活动指数、医生整体评估（PhGA）、患者整体评估（PGA）和疼痛视觉模拟量表（VAS）。21名患者参与。干预后，PhGA和疼痛VAS观察到显著改善。中度至高度幸福感的频率从71.4%增加到95.2%，而高度心理困扰从76.2%下降到14.3%。患者激活也得到改善，自我管理水平高的病例占71.4%，这一比例上升至81.0%。在这项初步研究中，将结构化情绪健康工作坊整合到多学科护理中与RA和SpA患者的心理幸福感和患者激活改善相关。这些发现提示将心理社会干预纳入常规风湿病护理的潜在价值，但需在更大规模的对照试验中确认。

items.title: Cardiac Rehabilitation for Cardiovascular Risk Modification in Patients With Rheumatoid Arthritis and Hypertension: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.abstract: Patients with rheumatoid arthritis (RA) have an increased risk of cardiovascular disease, particularly when hypertension coexists. However, evidence regarding the role of cardiac rehabilitation (CR) in this high-risk population remains limited. In this randomized controlled trial, the effects of a structured CR program on estimated cardiovascular risk, ambulatory blood pressure, and cardiorespiratory fitness were evaluated in patients with RA and hypertension. In this single-center randomized controlled trial, 50 patients with RA and hypertension were randomly assigned (1:1) to a 6-week supervised CR program or usual care. The intervention included supervised aerobic, resistance, and flexibility training together with weekly educational sessions. Outcomes were assessed at baseline and at 6, 12, and 24 weeks by blinded evaluators. The primary outcome was estimated 10-year cardiovascular risk assessed using the Framingham Risk Score (FRS), with QRISK 3 analyzed as a supportive risk measure. Secondary outcomes included 24-h ambulatory systolic blood pressure measured by ambulatory blood pressure monitoring (ABPM), cardiorespiratory fitness assessed by treadmill cardiopulmonary exercise testing (VO 2 max), and rheumatoid arthritis disease activity (DAS28-CRP). Longitudinal changes were analyzed using linear mixed-effects models according to the intention-to-treat principle. Linear mixed-effects modeling demonstrated a significant group × time interaction for FRS (p < 0.001). At Week 24, the between-group difference in FRS was -5.02 points (95% CI -8.60 to -1.44; p = 0.007). QRISK 3 showed a similar directional reduction but did not reach statistical significance at Week 24 (-5.77 points; 95% CI -12.54 to 1.01; p = 0.094). Significant group × time interactions were also observed for 24-h ambulatory systolic blood pressure (p < 0.001) and VO 2 max (p < 0.001). At Week 24, the between-group difference was -9.70 mmHg for ambulatory systolic blood pressure and + 4.90 mL·kg -1 ·min -1 for VO 2 max. Disease activity remained within the remission range throughout follow-up. In selected patients with clinically stable rheumatoid arthritis and coexisting hypertension who were receiving stable pharmacologic therapy and were able to participate in supervised exercise, a structured cardiac rehabilitation program was associated with improvements in estimated cardiovascular risk profiles, ambulatory systolic blood pressure, and cardiorespiratory fitness without worsening disease activity. These findings support further evaluation of cardiac rehabilitation as an adjunctive strategy for cardiovascular risk management in a selected cardiometabolically high-risk rheumatoid arthritis population with hypertension. The trial was registered at ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier: NCT06295848.

items.titleZh: 心脏康复对类风湿关节炎合并高血压患者心血管风险改善的随机对照试验
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）患者心血管疾病风险增加，尤其当合并高血压时。然而，关于心脏康复（CR）在这一高危人群中作用的证据仍然有限。本随机对照试验评估了结构化CR项目对RA合并高血压患者估计心血管风险、动态血压和心肺功能的影响。在这项单中心随机对照试验中，50例RA合并高血压患者被随机分配（1:1）至为期6周的监督下CR项目或常规护理。干预包括监督下有氧、抗阻和柔韧性训练，以及每周教育课程。结局在基线及第6、12、24周由盲法评估者评估。主要结局是使用弗雷明汉风险评分（FRS）评估的估计10年心血管风险，QRISK 3作为支持性风险指标进行分析。次要结局包括通过动态血压监测（ABPM）测量的24小时动态收缩压、通过跑步机心肺运动试验（VO2 max）评估的心肺功能，以及类风湿关节炎疾病活动度（DAS28-CRP）。采用线性混合效应模型按意向治疗原则分析纵向变化。线性混合效应模型显示FRS存在显著的组×时间交互作用（p < 0.001）。在第24周，FRS的组间差异为-5.02分（95% CI -8.60至-1.44；p = 0.007）。QRISK 3显示相似的方向性降低，但在第24周未达到统计学显著性（-5.77分；95% CI -12.54至1.01；p = 0.094）。24小时动态收缩压（p < 0.001）和VO2 max（p < 0.001）也观察到显著的组×时间交互作用。在第24周，动态收缩压的组间差异为-9.70 mmHg，VO2 max的组间差异为+4.90 mL·kg-1·min-1。疾病活动度在整个随访期间保持在缓解范围内。在临床稳定的类风湿关节炎合并高血压、接受稳定药物治疗且能够参与监督下运动的选定患者中，结构化心脏康复项目与估计心血管风险谱、动态收缩压和心肺功能的改善相关，且未加重疾病活动度。这些发现支持进一步评估心脏康复作为合并高血压的选定心脏代谢高危类风湿关节炎人群心血管风险管理的辅助策略。该试验在ClinicalTrials.gov注册，标识号：NCT06295848。

items.title: Type IV Takayasu Arteritis Presenting as a Late-Onset Hypertensive Emergency and Transient Ischemia: A Case Report Highlighting Diagnostic Challenges.
items.abstract: A 69-year-old female patient presented with a hypertensive emergency and recurrent episodes of left upper extremity paresthesia. While initial cerebrovascular imaging was negative, physical examination revealed a significant blood pressure discrepancy between the upper extremities. Subsequent computed tomography angiography of the abdomen identified abnormal circumferential wall thickening of the infrarenal abdominal aorta extending into the common iliac arteries, consistent with aortitis. Additionally, duplicate left renal arteries were noted, with severe stenosis of the posterior artery driving the hypertensive crisis. These findings supported a diagnosis of Type IV Takayasu arteritis, an exceptional presentation in a patient of advanced age with normal inflammatory markers. The patient was stabilized with intravenous antihypertensive therapy and transferred for multidisciplinary management. This case underscores the importance of considering large-vessel vasculitis in the differential diagnosis of elderly patients presenting with unexplained hypertensive emergencies, as reliance on age demographics or inflammatory markers may delay accurate diagnosis.

items.titleZh: IV型高安动脉炎表现为迟发性高血压急症和短暂性缺血：一例强调诊断挑战的病例报告
items.abstractZh: 一名69岁女性患者出现高血压急症和左上肢感觉异常反复发作。虽然初始脑血管影像学检查阴性，但体格检查发现双上肢血压显著差异。随后的腹部计算机断层血管造影显示肾下腹主动脉异常环形壁增厚，延伸至髂总动脉，符合主动脉炎表现。此外，发现双支左肾动脉，其中后动脉严重狭窄导致高血压危象。这些发现支持IV型高安动脉炎的诊断，这是一例在年龄较大且炎症标志物正常的患者中的特殊表现。患者通过静脉抗高血压治疗稳定后转诊接受多学科管理。本病例强调了在出现不明原因高血压急症的老年患者鉴别诊断中考虑大血管炎的重要性，因为依赖年龄人口统计学或炎症标志物可能延误准确诊断。

items.title: Regional mandibular trabecular alterations in rheumatoid arthritis: a fractal analysis study using panoramic radiographs.
items.abstract: To examine the regional alterations of mandibular trabecular bone microarchitecture in RA patients using the analysis of panoramic radiographs based on the fractal dimension (FD)' and to assess the effect of the duration of glucocorticoid (GC) treatment․ METHODS: In this retrospective study' 96 RA patients and 96 controls were recruited․ The FD of four standardized regions of interest (ROIs) was measured using ImageJ: the condyle' the mandibular angle' the two trabecular areas of the corpus (including the area anterior to the mental foramen)․ Group comparisons were performed using non-parametric tests and multivariable logistic regression' adjusted for age and sex․ A subgroup analysis based on age (≥ 40 years' respectively) was used to rule out residual confounding by age․ RESULTS: FD was considerably lower in the RA group compared to the control group in all regions of interest (p < 0․001)․ The differences in the condylar region and the trabecular region anterior to the mental foramen had the largest differences and retained their importance after controlling for other factors․ These findings were similar in the age-restricted subgroup analyzes and did not have an important association (p > 0․05) with GC duration of use․ CONCLUSION: RA is associated with site-specific deterioration of mandibular trabecular microarchitecture' particularly in the condylar region and the trabecular region anterior to the mental foramen․ FD analysis of panoramic radiographs may be a useful imaging biomarker for detecting skeletal involvement in the RA population․.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎患者下颌骨区域小梁改变：基于全景X线片的分形分析研究
items.abstractZh: 目的：通过基于分形维数（FD）的全景X线片分析，研究RA患者下颌骨小梁微结构的区域改变，并评估糖皮质激素（GC）治疗持续时间的影响。METHODS：在这项回顾性研究中，纳入了96名RA患者和96名对照组。使用ImageJ测量四个标准化感兴趣区域（ROIs）的FD：髁突、下颌角、下颌体两个小梁区域（包括颏孔前区域）。采用非参数检验和多变量逻辑回归进行组间比较，并校正年龄和性别。基于年龄（分别≥40岁）的亚组分析用于排除年龄的残余混杂。RESULTS：与对照组相比，RA组在所有感兴趣区域的FD均显著降低（p < 0.001）。髁突区域和颏孔前小梁区域的差异最大，且在控制其他因素后仍保持其重要性。这些发现在年龄限制的亚组分析中相似，并且与GC使用持续时间无显著关联（p > 0.05）。CONCLUSION：RA与下颌骨小梁微结构的部位特异性恶化相关，尤其是在髁突区域和颏孔前小梁区域。全景X线片的FD分析可能是检测RA人群骨骼受累的有用影像生物标志物。

items.title: Living donor liver transplantation from a donor with definite obstetric antiphospholipid syndrome: a case report with perioperative risk mitigation strategy.
items.abstract: Antiphospholipid syndrome (APS) is an acquired autoimmune thrombophilia associated with venous, arterial, and microvascular thrombosis. Living donor liver transplantation (LDLT) from a donor with definite APS is exceptionally uncommon and raises a difficult balance between recipient benefit and donor safety. We report LDLT using a right lobe graft from a 47-year-old female spouse donor with recurrent spontaneous abortions and persistent lupus anticoagulant positivity documented on repeat testing more than 12 weeks apart, fulfilling criteria for definite obstetric APS. Anticardiolipin immunoglobulin M was positive, whereas antinuclear antibody profile and inherited thrombophilia screening were unremarkable. After multidisciplinary review, donation proceeded under an individualized protocol including baseline vascular assessment, temporary perioperative interruption of aspirin and hydroxychloroquine to mitigate surgical bleeding risk, low-molecular-weight heparin after surgical hemostasis, staged reintroduction of aspirin and hydroxychloroquine, and serial Doppler surveillance. Donor hepatectomy and recipient implantation were uneventful. Hepatic arterial and portal venous flow remained preserved, and neither donor nor recipient developed thrombosis or major bleeding during early follow-up. This case suggests that definite obstetric APS should be regarded as a high-risk donor factor, not an automatic contraindication, when stringent selection, explicit consent, hematology-led prophylaxis, and vigilant surveillance are available.

items.titleZh: 来自明确产科抗磷脂综合征供体的活体肝移植：一例围手术期风险缓解策略的病例报告
items.abstractZh: 抗磷脂综合征（APS）是一种获得性自身免疫性血栓形成倾向，与静脉、动脉和微血管血栓形成相关。来自明确APS供体的活体肝移植（LDLT）极为罕见，并在受者获益与供者安全之间提出了艰难的平衡。我们报告一例使用右叶移植物进行的LDLT，供者为47岁女性配偶，有反复自然流产史，且间隔12周以上的重复检测证实持续性狼疮抗凝物阳性，符合明确产科APS的标准。抗心磷脂免疫球蛋白M阳性，而抗核抗体谱和遗传性血栓形成倾向筛查未见异常。经多学科评估后，供体捐献按照个体化方案进行，包括基线血管评估、围手术期暂时停用阿司匹林和羟氯喹以降低手术出血风险、外科止血后使用低分子肝素、逐步重新引入阿司匹林和羟氯喹，以及连续多普勒监测。供体肝切除术和受体植入过程顺利。肝动脉和门静脉血流保持通畅，供体和受体在早期随访期间均未发生血栓形成或大出血。本病例提示，当具备严格筛选、明确知情同意、血液科主导的预防措施和警惕监测时，明确产科APS应被视为高风险供体因素，而非绝对禁忌症。

items.title: Hyperuricemia beyond gout: an emerging risk factor for sensorineural hearing loss.
items.abstract: Hyperuricemia is a common metabolic condition with established systemic effects; however, its potential association with auditory dysfunction has not been clearly defined. This study aimed to evaluate hearing thresholds and cochlear outer hair cell function in individuals with hyperuricemia using subjective and objective audiological assessments. A comparative cross-sectional study was conducted involving 130 participants aged 30-55 years, comprising 65 hyperuricemic subjects and 65 age- and gender-matched normouricemic controls. Pure Tone Audiometry (PTA) was performed at frequencies from 250 to 8000 Hz. Distortion Product Otoacoustic Emissions (DPOAE) were recorded at 1000, 2000, 4000, 6000, and 8000 Hz, and signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) values were analyzed. Statistical analysis included Student's t-test, Mann-Whitney U test, and Chi-square test, with p < 0.05 considered statistically significant. Mean PTA thresholds were higher in hyperuricemic subjects across all tested frequencies compared to controls, with statistically significant differences (p < 0.001). Mild sensorineural hearing loss was more frequently observed in the hyperuricemic group. DPOAE analysis demonstrated significantly reduced SNR values, particularly at higher frequencies, and a higher proportion of absent emissions in hyperuricemic subjects. No significant association was observed between hearing loss and age or duration of symptoms. The findings suggest an association between hyperuricemia and early cochlear dysfunction. Objective measures such as DPOAE may be useful for identifying subclinical auditory involvement in this population.

items.titleZh: 超越痛风的尿酸血症：感音神经性听力损失的新兴危险因素
items.abstractZh: 高尿酸血症是一种常见的代谢性疾病，具有确定的全身性影响；然而，其与听觉功能障碍的潜在关联尚未明确。本研究旨在通过主观和客观听力学评估，评估高尿酸血症患者的听力阈值和耳蜗外毛细胞功能。进行了一项比较横断面研究，纳入130名30-55岁参与者，包括65名高尿酸血症受试者和65名年龄和性别匹配的正常尿酸对照组。在250至8000 Hz频率下进行纯音测听（PTA）。在1000、2000、4000、6000和8000 Hz记录畸变产物耳声发射（DPOAE），并分析信噪比（SNR）值。统计分析包括Student t检验、Mann-Whitney U检验和卡方检验，p < 0.05视为统计学显著。与对照组相比，高尿酸血症受试者在所有测试频率下的平均PTA阈值均较高，差异具有统计学显著性（p < 0.001）。轻度感音神经性听力损失在高尿酸血症组中更常见。DPOAE分析显示SNR值显著降低，尤其是在较高频率，且高尿酸血症受试者中缺失发射的比例更高。未观察到听力损失与年龄或症状持续时间之间存在显著关联。研究结果表明高尿酸血症与早期耳蜗功能障碍之间存在关联。DPOAE等客观测量可能有助于识别该人群中的亚临床听觉受累。

items.title: Anakinra treatment practices in colchicine-resistant familial Mediterranean fever: a survey of pediatric rheumatologists conducted through the PReS AID-WP and the Turkish pediatric rheumatology associations.
items.abstract: Colchicine-resistant familial Mediterranean fever (cr-FMF) represents a therapeutic challenge, and anakinra, a recombinant interleukin-1 receptor antagonist, is widely used in clinical practice. Our aim was to describe real-world practices of pediatric rheumatologists regarding anakinra use in patients with cr-FMF, with a focus on treatment initiation, tapering strategies, and discontinuation approaches. This survey-based study included pediatric rheumatologists with at least one year of clinical experience in managing cr-FMF. The survey assessed physician characteristics, treatment practices including initiation, tapering, and discontinuation strategies. Data were collected via an online survey platform between September and November 2025. A total of 81 pediatric rheumatologists participated, mostly practicing in Türkiye (92.6%). Most respondents preferred once-daily anakinra at 1-2 mg/kg/day and assessed response within the first month. Among tapering strategies, 90.1% favored interval extension, most commonly every 3 days or weekly. 79.0% considered discontinuation after sustained remission (median 6 months). During tapering-related flares, clinicians preferred interval shortening (43.2%) or dose escalation (37.0%), while 19.8% switched to an alternative biologic. After discontinuation-related relapse, 81.5% restarted anakinra at the previous effective dose. While anakinra initiation and relapse management appear relatively consistent, tapering and discontinuation strategies remain highly variable, underscoring the need for evidence-based guidance.

items.titleZh: 秋水仙碱抵抗性家族性地中海热中阿那白滞素治疗实践：通过PReS AID-WP和土耳其儿童风湿病学协会进行的儿童风湿病学家调查
items.abstractZh: 秋水仙碱抵抗性家族性地中海热（cr-FMF）是一种治疗挑战，阿那白滞素（一种重组白细胞介素-1受体拮抗剂）在临床实践中被广泛使用。我们的目的是描述儿童风湿病学家在cr-FMF患者中使用阿那白滞素的真实世界实践，重点关注治疗启动、减量策略和停药方法。这项基于调查的研究纳入了至少有一年cr-FMF管理临床经验的儿童风湿病学家。调查评估了医生特征、治疗实践，包括启动、减量和停药策略。数据通过在线调查平台在2025年9月至11月期间收集。共有81名儿童风湿病学家参与，主要在土耳其执业（92.6%）。大多数受访者偏好每日一次1-2 mg/kg/天的阿那白滞素，并在第一个月内评估反应。在减量策略中，90.1%倾向于延长给药间隔，最常见的是每3天或每周一次。79.0%考虑在持续缓解后停药（中位6个月）。在减量相关的发作期间，临床医生偏好缩短间隔（43.2%）或增加剂量（37.0%），而19.8%换用其他生物制剂。在停药相关复发后，81.5%以先前有效剂量重新开始阿那白滞素。虽然阿那白滞素的启动和复发管理相对一致，但减量和停药策略仍然高度可变，这强调了需要基于证据的指导。

items.title: Identification of novel serum proteins that distinguish idiopathic recurrent aphthous stomatitis from Behcet's disease.
items.abstract: Recurrent aphthous stomatitis (RAS) is a chronic autoinflammatory condition marked by recurring, painful sores in the mouth. It is often confused with Behcet's disease (BD), a rare systemic vasculitis that also presents with oral ulcers. Despite overlapping symptoms, BD has broader systemic implications, making an accurate diagnosis critical. This study aims to identify unique serum proteins that could reliably distinguish idiopathic RAS from BD. We reanalyzed our previous mass spectrometry dataset comprising blood samples from 12 BD patients, 12 individuals with idiopathic RAS, and 21 healthy controls. Differentially expressed proteins (DEPs) related to RAS were identified and examined through Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes and Gene Ontology pathway enrichment. A protein-protein interaction (PPI) network was created to explore functional connections among the DEPs. Validation of three RAS-related proteins was carried out using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) in a separate cohort of 26 RAS patients, 26 BD patients, and 30 healthy individuals. Their diagnostic utility was then evaluated via receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curve analysis. A total of 99 proteins showed differential expression in RAS samples but not in BD cases when compared to healthy controls-85 were upregulated, and 14 were downregulated. Enrichment analyses indicated these proteins are primarily involved in metabolic and infection-related pathways, particularly influencing keratinocyte differentiation and oxidative stress responses. PPI network analysis highlighted key metabolic and keratinocyte-related proteins as central hubs, suggesting a role in RAS pathology. ELISA validation confirmed significantly elevated levels of ANXA2, ENO1, and S100A7 in RAS patients compared to both BD patients and healthy subjects. Our findings identify a set of RAS-related serum proteins with potential diagnostic value. These serum proteins may enhance the clinical differentiation of RAS from BD, aiding in more accurate and timely patient care.

items.title: Exploration of Multidimensional Treatment for Ankylosing Spondylitis: From Traditional Medications to Emerging Immune-Targeted Perspectives.
items.abstract: Ankylosing spondylitis (AS) is a chronic immune-mediated disease involving persistent inflammation of the axial skeleton and peripheral joints, often progressing to spinal deformity and irreversible ankylosis. Current therapeutic strategies, primarily non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs and biologic agents, focus on symptomatic relief and inflammation suppression. However, these treatments fail to halt long-term structural progression or prevent bone fusion. Recently, advanced immunotherapies, including mesenchymal stem cell (MSC) transplantation and chimeric antigen receptor (CAR)-based therapies, have been proposed as emerging exploratory strategies. While these modalities offer the theoretical potential for deep immune remodeling and might influence pathological ossification, their application in AS remains largely extrapolated from other autoimmune diseases. It is crucial to note that while traditional therapies are supported by robust clinical evidence, advanced targeted cellular immunotherapies in AS are currently in preclinical or early exploratory stages with limited direct clinical data. Globally, AS exerts a substantial socioeconomic burden, affecting young adults and requiring more effective disease-modifying interventions. Unlike existing reviews focused primarily on standard pharmaceutical updates, this article provides a novel synthesis by connecting AS immunopathogenesis with the translational potential of precision cellular engineering, offering a roadmap for future clinical research.

items.titleZh: 强直性脊柱炎多维治疗探索：从传统药物到新兴免疫靶向视角
items.abstractZh: 强直性脊柱炎（AS）是一种慢性免疫介导性疾病，涉及中轴骨骼和周围关节的持续性炎症，常进展为脊柱畸形和不可逆性强直。当前治疗策略主要为非甾体抗炎药和生物制剂，侧重于症状缓解和炎症抑制。然而，这些治疗未能阻止长期结构进展或预防骨融合。近年来，先进的免疫疗法，包括间充质干细胞（MSC）移植和基于嵌合抗原受体（CAR）的疗法，已被提出作为新兴探索性策略。虽然这些方式具有深度免疫重塑的理论潜力，并可能影响病理性骨化，但其在AS中的应用仍主要从其他自身免疫性疾病外推而来。值得注意的是，虽然传统疗法有强有力的临床证据支持，但AS中的先进靶向细胞免疫疗法目前处于临床前或早期探索阶段，直接临床数据有限。在全球范围内，AS造成显著的社会经济负担，影响年轻成年人，需要更有效的疾病修饰干预措施。与现有主要关注标准药物更新的综述不同，本文通过将AS免疫发病机制与精准细胞工程的转化潜力联系起来，提供了一种新颖的综合，为未来临床研究提供了路线图。

items.title: Biomimetic nanosystem rewires microRNA-mediated inflammatory circuits and disrupts ROS crosstalk for multifaceted rheumatoid arthritis therapy.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) persists due to the intractable pro-inflammatory M1 macrophage phenotype, sustained by dysregulated cytokine/reactive oxygen species (ROS) production, where conventional single-target therapies fail to achieve durable M1-to-M2 repolarization. To address this, we develop DPPDz@EXO, a biomimetic nanosystem that integrates M1 responsiveness with multi-target therapy functionality. Its core (DPP) consists of redox-sensitive polydopamine nanoparticles modified with dihydrolipoic acid and polyethyleneimine, enabling ROS scavenging and delivery of a miRNA-programmed DNAzyme (Dz). The Dz stays inactive in healthy cells but is selectively activated by M1 macrophage-overexpressed miRNA-155, triggering cleavage of upstream regulator miRNA-342. This initiates a self-amplifying regulatory cascade, in which suppression of pro-inflammatory miRNA-155 leads to inhibition of JAK/STAT signaling, while concurrent upregulation of anti-inflammatory miRNA-let-7e attenuates NF-κB activation. Together, these effects synergistically suppress multiple pro-inflammatory pathways at their root. An outer shell of M2 macrophage-derived exosomes (EXO) provides inflammation-targeted delivery and inherent immunomodulatory signals. By simultaneously rewiring pathogenic miRNA networks, scavenging ROS, and reinforcing M2 polarization, DPPDz@EXO achieves effective and sustained M1-to-M2 repolarization and mitigates RA progression. This study introduces a comprehensive strategy integrating synthetic nanotechnology with endogenous immunoregulatory mechanisms, offering a powerful and adaptable platform for multi-target RA therapy.

items.titleZh: 仿生纳米系统重编程microRNA介导的炎症回路并破坏ROS串扰用于多靶点类风湿关节炎治疗
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）因难治性促炎M1巨噬细胞表型而持续存在，该表型由失调的细胞因子/活性氧（ROS）产生维持，传统单靶点治疗无法实现持久的M1向M2重极化。为此，我们开发了DPPDz@EXO，一种整合M1响应性与多靶点治疗功能的仿生纳米系统。其核心（DPP）由氧化还原敏感的多巴胺纳米颗粒修饰二氢硫辛酸和聚乙烯亚胺组成，可实现ROS清除并递送miRNA编程的DNAzyme（Dz）。Dz在健康细胞中保持失活，但被M1巨噬细胞过表达的miRNA-155选择性激活，触发上游调控因子miRNA-342的切割。这启动了一个自我放大的调控级联反应：抑制促炎miRNA-155导致JAK/STAT信号通路抑制，同时抗炎miRNA-let-7e上调减弱NF-κB激活。这些效应协同从根源上抑制多个促炎通路。M2巨噬细胞来源的外泌体（EXO）外壳提供炎症靶向递送和固有免疫调节信号。通过同时重编程致病miRNA网络、清除ROS并强化M2极化，DPPDz@EXO实现了有效且持久的M1向M2重极化，并缓解RA进展。本研究提出了一种整合合成纳米技术与内源性免疫调节机制的综合策略，为多靶点RA治疗提供了强大且可适应的平台。

items.title: Relative muscle mass is preserved during weight loss in rheumatoid arthritis: a post-hoc RCT analysis.
items.abstract: Obesity and sarcopenia commonly coexist in RA, compounding metabolic risk and disability. Intentional weight loss may improve outcomes but raises concern for accelerated muscle loss. We conducted a post-hoc analysis of a randomized controlled trial (RCT) of a hypocaloric, high-protein diet in adults with RA and obesity to determine whether diet-induced weight loss was associated with disproportionate reductions in muscle mass. Adults with RA and obesity were randomized to a 12-week hypocaloric, high-protein diet or to control dietary advice (NCT02881307). DXA was performed at baseline and 12 weeks. Fat mass index (FMI), appendicular lean mass index (ALMI) and adiposity-adjusted ALMI (ALMI FMI ) were derived and standardized to Z-scores using national reference data. Between-group differences in change were compared using t -tests, with FDR-adjusted P values reported for all analyses. Participants in the dietary intervention achieved significant reductions in total fat mass (mean change in FMI Z-score -0.35 vs 0.04; P  = 0.003). Changes in ALMI Z-score (-0.37 vs -0.43; P  = 0.92) and ALMI FMI Z-score (-0.15 vs -0.55; P  = 0.92) did not differ significantly between groups. In the intervention group there was minimal decline in ALM FMI , suggesting parallel reductions in lean and fat tissue. In adults with RA and obesity, diet-induced weight loss reduced adiposity without evidence of disproportionate muscle loss. These findings support the safety of structured, protein-adequate weight-loss interventions in this population.

items.title: Late-Onset Axial Spondyloarthritis in an Elderly Patient: A Case Report.
items.abstract: Spondyloarthritis is a group of chronic inflammatory rheumatic diseases characterized by predominant involvement of the axial skeleton (spine and sacroiliac joints) and/or peripheral joints, along with inflammation at sites of tendon and ligament insertion (enthesitis). The disease commonly affects young adults. However, late-onset spondyloarthritis in an elderly patient is a very rare condition, but it can occur. We report a 57-year-old woman admitted to the ​Medicine A Department of Calmette Hospital in April 2026 for two years of chronic inflammatory pain in the left buttock associated with peripheral joint pain. The symptoms meet the full criteria for axial spondyloarthritis, except for the age of the patient. Spondyloarthritis is a chronic inflammatory rheumatic disease that commonly affects young adults, with onset usually before the age of 45 years. Our case highlights the need to re-evaluate the role of the age-at-onset criterion in the Assessment of SpondyloArthritis international Society (ASAS) classification system. While the current criteria perform well in younger populations, rare cases of late-onset spondyloarthritis suggest that some patients may not be adequately captured. Larger epidemiological and validation studies are needed before any modification of the classification criteria can be recommended.

items.titleZh: 老年患者晚发性中轴型脊柱关节炎：一例病例报告
items.abstractZh: 脊柱关节炎是一组慢性炎症性风湿性疾病，其特征是主要累及中轴骨骼（脊柱和骶髂关节）和/或外周关节，以及肌腱和韧带附着点处的炎症（附着点炎）。该病通常影响年轻人。然而，老年患者晚发性脊柱关节炎是一种非常罕见的情况，但仍可能发生。我们报告一名57岁女性，于2026年4月因左臀部慢性炎性疼痛伴外周关节疼痛两年入住卡尔梅特医院内科A科。患者的症状符合中轴型脊柱关节炎的全部标准，但年龄除外。脊柱关节炎是一种慢性炎症性风湿性疾病，通常影响年轻人，发病年龄通常在45岁之前。本病例强调需要重新评估国际脊柱关节炎评估协会（ASAS）分类系统中发病年龄标准的作用。虽然当前标准在较年轻人群中表现良好，但罕见的晚发性脊柱关节炎病例表明，一些患者可能未被充分识别。在推荐修改分类标准之前，需要进行更大规模的流行病学和验证研究。

items.title: Acute Motor Axonal Neuropathy (AMAN) Variant of Guillain-Barré Syndrome Following Influenza Vaccination as the Initial Presentation of Systemic Lupus Erythematosus With Lupus Nephritis.
items.abstract: Guillain-Barré syndrome (GBS) is an acute immune-mediated polyradiculoneuropathy that commonly follows infections and, less frequently, vaccination. Although peripheral nervous system involvement may occur in systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE), GBS as the initial manifestation of SLE is uncommon, particularly in adolescents. Herein, we describe the case of a previously healthy 17-year-old Saudi female patient who presented with rapidly progressive bilateral lower-limb weakness, areflexia, bilateral foot drop, and urinary retention occurring approximately two weeks after an upper respiratory tract infection and one week after receiving an influenza vaccine. Nerve conduction studies and electromyography demonstrated a demyelinating-axonal polyneuropathy compatible with the acute motor axonal neuropathy (AMAN) variant of GBS. During hospitalization, she was also found to have inflammatory ascites, pleural effusions, Coombs-positive anemia, proteinuria, positive antinuclear antibodies, markedly elevated anti-double-stranded DNA (anti-dsDNA) antibodies, and hypocomplementemia. Renal biopsy confirmed minimal mesangial lupus nephritis (ISN/RPS Class I). Magnetic resonance imaging of the brain and entire spine was unremarkable. The patient received intravenous immunoglobulin, corticosteroids, hydroxychloroquine, and supportive treatment. Although cyclophosphamide was considered because of concerns regarding neuropsychiatric lupus, it was ultimately withheld. The patient achieved complete neurological recovery without cyclophosphamide. This case highlights the occurrence of AMAN variant GBS shortly after influenza vaccination as the initial presentation leading to the diagnosis of SLE and lupus nephritis.

items.titleZh: 流感疫苗接种后急性运动轴索性神经病（AMAN）变异型吉兰-巴雷综合征作为系统性红斑狼疮伴狼疮肾炎的首发表现
items.abstractZh: 吉兰-巴雷综合征（GBS）是一种急性免疫介导的多发性神经根神经病，通常继发于感染，较少见于疫苗接种。虽然系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）可能累及周围神经系统，但GBS作为SLE的首发表现并不常见，尤其在青少年中。本文描述了一例既往健康的17岁沙特女性患者，她在上呼吸道感染约两周后、接种流感疫苗一周后出现快速进展的双下肢无力、腱反射消失、双侧足下垂和尿潴留。神经传导研究和肌电图显示脱髓鞘-轴索性多发性神经病，符合GBS的急性运动轴索性神经病（AMAN）变异型。住院期间，她还被发现患有炎性腹水、胸腔积液、Coombs阳性贫血、蛋白尿、抗核抗体阳性、抗双链DNA（抗dsDNA）抗体显著升高和低补体血症。肾活检证实为轻微系膜增生性狼疮肾炎（ISN/RPS I级）。脑和全脊柱磁共振成像未见异常。患者接受了静脉注射免疫球蛋白、皮质类固醇、羟氯喹和支持治疗。尽管因担心神经精神性狼疮而考虑使用环磷酰胺，但最终未使用。患者在没有环磷酰胺的情况下实现了完全神经功能恢复。本病例强调了流感疫苗接种后不久出现AMAN变异型GBS作为导致SLE和狼疮肾炎诊断的首发表现。

items.title: E4BP4 restrains effector-memory CD8 + T cell responses in systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: Increasing evidence shows that CD8 + T cells are the pathogenic mediators of tissue injury in systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE), sustaining the chronic inflammation through the accumulation of long-lived cytotoxic memory populations. However, the transcriptional mechanisms that prevent the aberrant differentiation of pathogenic CD8 + T cells remain poorly understood. Here, the transcription factor E4BP4 (NFIL3) was identified as a critical restraint of cytotoxic effector-memory CD8 + T cells in lupus. E4BP4 expression was reduced in CD8 + T cells from SLE patients and inversely correlated with disease activity. Using a lupus-like disease model, we found that E4BP4 deficiency accelerated disease progression, resulting in heightened autoantibody production, immune complex deposition, and renal pathology. This phenotype was associated with the systemic accumulation of cytotoxic effector-memory CD8 + T cells. Depletion of CD8 + T cells significantly ameliorated the disease phenotype, confirming the functional contribution of CD8 + T cells to lupus-like immunopathology. Competitive adoptive transfer experiments revealed that E4BP4 functions cell-intrinsically to limit the cytotoxicity and proliferation of CD8 + T cells in autoimmunity. Beyond autoimmunity, E4BP4 deficiency also resulted in an exuberant CD8 + effector-memory T cell response to Listeria monocytogenes infection, indicating a broader role for E4BP4 in limiting CD8 + T cell effector-memory responses. Collectively, these findings establish E4BP4 as a transcriptional checkpoint that restricts pathogenic CD8 + effector-memory T cell responses to maintain immune homeostasis in autoimmunity and infection.

items.titleZh: E4BP4抑制系统性红斑狼疮中效应记忆CD8+ T细胞反应
items.abstractZh: 越来越多的证据表明，CD8+ T细胞是系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）组织损伤的致病介质，通过积累长寿命的细胞毒性记忆群体维持慢性炎症。然而，阻止致病性CD8+ T细胞异常分化的转录机制仍知之甚少。本文发现转录因子E4BP4（NFIL3）是狼疮中细胞毒性效应记忆CD8+ T细胞的关键抑制因子。SLE患者CD8+ T细胞中E4BP4表达降低，并与疾病活动度呈负相关。利用狼疮样疾病模型，我们发现E4BP4缺失加速了疾病进展，导致自身抗体产生、免疫复合物沉积和肾脏病理加重。该表型与细胞毒性效应记忆CD8+ T细胞的系统性积累相关。清除CD8+ T细胞显著改善了疾病表型，证实了CD8+ T细胞对狼疮样免疫病理的功能性贡献。竞争性过继转移实验显示，E4BP4以细胞内在方式限制自身免疫中CD8+ T细胞的细胞毒性和增殖。除自身免疫外，E4BP4缺失还导致对单核细胞增生李斯特菌感染的CD8+效应记忆T细胞反应过度，表明E4BP4在限制CD8+ T细胞效应记忆反应中具有更广泛的作用。总之，这些发现确立了E4BP4作为限制致病性CD8+效应记忆T细胞反应以维持自身免疫和感染中免疫稳态的转录检查点。

items.title: Illness Experiences of Young Women With Rheumatoid Arthritis in South Korea.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis affects young women during critical life-course stages, requiring ongoing adaptation to illness-related uncertainty while managing social roles and expectations. Women in their 20s to 40s face distinctive challenges related to illness disclosure, stigma and life-course tasks, particularly around childbirth and caregiving roles. This qualitative study explored the illness experiences of women with rheumatoid arthritis in their 20s to 40s and examined how they construct everyday normality amid uncertainty and life-course tasks. Colaizzi's descriptive phenomenological method. Semi-structured in-depth interviews were conducted with 20 women aged 20-49 years who met the 2010 American College of Rheumatology/European Alliance of Associations for Rheumatology classification criteria. The mean interview duration was 58 min. Colaizzi's seven-step phenomenological analysis was applied; coding consistency was checked (Cohen's kappa = 0.90). From 529 meaning units, 42 subthemes, 12 core themes and 5 theme clusters were derived, with an overarching theme of 'Constructing normality between uncertainty and life-course tasks'. Participants employed differentiated disclosure strategies, transitioning from concealment to selective disclosure around childbirth. Two novel concepts were identified: 'forced disclosure', wherein illness was unintentionally exposed due to structural factors, and 'legitimised vulnerability', wherein social approval for help-seeking was obtained through the maternal role. Young Korean women with rheumatoid arthritis reported experiencing patterns of diagnostic delay, shifts in disclosure strategies with childbirth as the turning point, and maternal role conflict. Participants did not experience disclosure as a purely individual decision. Instead, they feared that disclosure would lead to being devalued as 'a sick person' or 'a weak person', which shaped their disclosure strategies. Childbirth serves as a turning point in illness disclosure strategies, highlighting the need for nursing interventions tailored to life-course tasks. A registered nurse who is herself living with rheumatoid arthritis contributed to developing and refining the interview questions during the study design phase. She also provided limited input during analysis by helping to confirm the meaning of some participant statements, enhancing the study's credibility and relevance to the experiences of young women with RA.

items.titleZh: 韩国年轻女性类风湿关节炎的疾病体验
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎在关键的生命历程阶段影响年轻女性，要求她们在管理社会角色和期望的同时，持续适应疾病相关的不确定性。20至40多岁的女性面临与疾病披露、污名化和生命历程任务相关的独特挑战，尤其是在生育和照护角色方面。本定性研究探讨了20至40多岁类风湿关节炎女性的疾病体验，并考察了她们如何在不确定性和生命历程任务中构建日常正常性。采用Colaizzi的描述性现象学方法。对20名年龄在20-49岁、符合2010年美国风湿病学会/欧洲风湿病联盟分类标准的女性进行了半结构化深度访谈。平均访谈时长为58分钟。应用Colaizzi的七步现象学分析；编码一致性经检验（Cohen's kappa = 0.90）。从529个意义单元中，衍生出42个亚主题、12个核心主题和5个主题簇，总主题为“在不确定性和生命历程任务之间构建正常性”。参与者采用了差异化的披露策略，从隐瞒过渡到围绕生育的选择性披露。识别出两个新概念：“被迫披露”，即疾病因结构性因素无意暴露；以及“合法化脆弱性”，即通过母亲角色获得寻求帮助的社会认可。年轻的韩国类风湿关节炎女性报告经历了诊断延迟、以生育为转折点的披露策略转变以及母亲角色冲突的模式。参与者并未将披露视为纯粹的个人决定。相反，她们担心披露会导致被贬低为“病人”或“弱者”，这塑造了她们的披露策略。生育是疾病披露策略的转折点，凸显了针对生命历程任务量身定制护理干预的必要性。一位自身患有类风湿关节炎的注册护士在研究设计阶段参与制定和完善了访谈问题。她还在分析过程中提供了有限的输入，帮助确认部分参与者陈述的含义，从而增强了研究的可信度及其与年轻RA女性体验的相关性。

items.title: Ultrasound-defined presynovitis is associated with progression to clinical arthritis in ACPA-positive individuals at risk of rheumatoid arthritis: longitudinal insights from the Karolinska Risk-RA cohort.
items.abstract: This study aimed to investigate whether ultrasound (US)-detected features preceding Doppler-active synovitis are associated with progression to clinical arthritis in anticitrullinated protein antibody (ACPA)-positive individuals with musculoskeletal (MSK) symptoms. In this prospective cohort study, 309 ACPA-positive individuals with MSK symptoms but without clinical arthritis and Doppler-active synovitis were included. US assessments evaluated minimal US findings, including synovial thickening, tendon sheath involvement, bursal effusions, and bone surface cortical irregularities. Longitudinal within-individual trajectories of US findings were analysed over time. Anticyclic citrullinated peptide 2 immunoglobulin G (IgG) and IgM rheumatoid factor (IgM RF) were measured at inclusion. The primary outcome was development of clinical arthritis over 3 years. Associations were analysed using Cox regression and logistic regression models. During a median follow-up of 13 months (IQR 7-22), 117 of 309 participants (38%) developed clinical arthritis, of whom 97 of 117 (83%) fulfilled the 2010 American College of Rheumatology/European League Against Rheumatism rhematoid arthritis classification criteria. Any US finding at baseline (75/309) was associated with a 3-fold increased risk of arthritis development (51/117 progressors vs 24/192 nonprogressors; hazard ratio [HR] 3.3, 95% CI 2.3-4.8). Among these, tendon sheath involvement showed the strongest association (HR 3.6, 95% CI 2.4-5.4), especially in combination with IgM RF positivity (HR 4.2, 95% CI 2.7-6.4). Longitudinal trajectories demonstrated progressive accumulation of US findings prior to arthritis onset, whereas such findings remained infrequent among nonprogressors. Tendon involvement frequently preceded synovial changes. Minimal US findings preceding Doppler-active synovitis, particularly tendon involvement, were strongly associated with progression to clinical arthritis in ACPA-positive individuals and support an US-identified 'presynovitis' phase of rheumatoid arthritis development and early risk stratification.

items.title: Lupus nephritis treatment: a comprehensive overview of recent meta-analyses and future directions.
items.abstract: This review summarizes recent findings from meta-analyses on lupus nephritis (LN) therapies to promote precision medicine and address the challenge of fragmented evidence. A literature search identified 34 relevant meta-analyses published between January 2021 and March 2025. Key findings include: Biological agents, particularly Belimumab and Obinutuzumab, significantly improve complete renal remission (CR) and reduce the risk of end-stage renal disease, breaking through traditional therapeutic bottlenecks. However, rituximab, while effective, carries a higher infection risk (SUCRA = 74.98%). The combination of tacrolimus and mycophenolate mofetil doubled the CR rate compared to monotherapy (OR = 2.85), but requires monitoring for creatinine elevation. Voclosporin use is limited by a high infection risk. The combination of Tripterygium glycosides and Western medicine increased the CR rate by 61% (RR = 1.61), while Astragalus-containing Chinese herbal medicine significantly reduced proteinuria (SMD = 0.51), highlighting the value of traditional Chinese medicine in enhancing efficacy and reducing toxicity. Glucocorticoid therapy presents a critical trade-off: an initial dose >60 mg/day improves CR to 34.6% but elevates severe infection and mortality rates to 12.1% and 2.7%, respectively, underscoring the urgent need for dose precision. In diagnostics, urinary TWEAK demonstrates high specificity. Mesenchymal stem cell therapy achieved a 33.7% remission rate. In conclusion, this review provides a comprehensive overview of recent research on LN treatment, offering evidence-based support for clinical decision-making and points out directions for future research. Lupus nephritis is a serious kidney complication of lupus that can lead to kidney failure if not treated effectively. This review summarizes 34 high-quality studies (2021–2025) to provide a clear overview of current treatments.Key findings: Biological drugs differ in efficacy and safety. Based on network meta-analyses, obinutuzumab ranks highest for complete renal remission (SUCRA = 85.2%), followed by belimumab, ocrelizumab; low-dose IL-2 also shows top efficacy with the lowest serious adverse event risk versus obinutuzumab, RTX, and belimumab. Belimumab significantly improves remission versus placebo (OR = 1.75, p  < 0.05), while obinutuzumab significantly improves overall remission versus placebo (OR = 2.27, p  < 0.05). For safety, low-dose IL-2 is safest, whereas rituximab carries the highest infection risk (SUCRA = 74.98%) compared with other agents; Belimumab does not increase overall adverse events. (SUCRA rankings suggest a hierarchy in efficacy and safety among biologics, though differences were not statistically significant and should be interpreted as descriptive trends).Combining tacrolimus and mycophenolate mofetil doubles the chance of kidney recovery versus monotherapy (OR = 2.85) but requires creatinine monitoring.Higher steroid doses improve remission but increase serious infection and mortality risks, highlighting the need for careful dose balancing.Traditional Chinese medicine, when added to Western medicine, shows additional benefits in improving kidney function and reducing side effects.Important gaps remain, including lack of pediatric studies and long-term safety data for new drugs.This guide helps doctors choose tailored treatments and points to future research directions.

items.titleZh: 狼疮性肾炎治疗：近期荟萃分析及未来方向的全面概述
items.abstractZh: 本综述总结了关于狼疮性肾炎（LN）治疗的荟萃分析的最新发现，以促进精准医学并应对证据碎片化的挑战。文献检索确定了2021年1月至2025年3月间发表的34项相关荟萃分析。主要发现包括：生物制剂，特别是贝利木单抗和奥比努珠单抗，显著改善完全肾脏缓解（CR）并降低终末期肾病的风险，突破了传统治疗瓶颈。然而，利妥昔单抗虽然有效，但感染风险较高（SUCRA = 74.98%）。他克莫司与吗替麦考酚酯联合治疗使CR率较单药治疗翻倍（OR = 2.85），但需监测肌酐升高。伏环孢素的使用受限于高感染风险。雷公藤多苷与西药联合使CR率提高61%（RR = 1.61），而含黄芪的中药显著降低蛋白尿（SMD = 0.51），凸显了中药增效减毒的价值。糖皮质激素治疗存在关键权衡：初始剂量>60 mg/天将CR提高至34.6%，但将严重感染和死亡率分别升高至12.1%和2.7%，强调了剂量精准化的迫切需求。在诊断方面，尿TWEAK显示出高特异性。间充质干细胞治疗达到33.7%的缓解率。总之，本综述全面概述了LN治疗的最新研究，为临床决策提供了循证支持，并指出了未来研究的方向。狼疮性肾炎是狼疮的一种严重肾脏并发症，若治疗无效可导致肾衰竭。本综述总结了34项高质量研究（2021–2025年），以提供当前治疗的清晰概览。主要发现：生物制剂的疗效和安全性存在差异。基于网络荟萃分析，奥比努珠单抗在完全肾脏缓解方面排名最高（SUCRA = 85.2%），其次是贝利木单抗、奥瑞珠单抗；低剂量IL-2也显示出顶级疗效，且严重不良事件风险最低，优于奥比努珠单抗、RTX和贝利木单抗。贝利木单抗较安慰剂显著改善缓解（OR = 1.75，p < 0.05），而奥比努珠单抗较安慰剂显著改善总体缓解（OR = 2.27，p < 0.05）。安全性方面，低剂量IL-2最安全，而利妥昔单抗的感染风险最高（SUCRA = 74.98%），与其他药物相比；贝利木单抗不增加总体不良事件。（SUCRA排名提示生物制剂在疗效和安全性上存在等级差异，但差异无统计学显著性，应视为描述性趋势）。他克莫司与吗替麦考酚酯联合治疗较单药治疗使肾脏恢复机会翻倍（OR = 2.85），但需监测肌酐。较高类固醇剂量可改善缓解，但增加严重感染和死亡风险，强调了谨慎剂量平衡的必要性。中药与西药联用在改善肾功能和减少副作用方面显示出额外益处。重要空白仍然存在，包括缺乏儿科研究和新药的长期安全性数据。本指南帮助医生选择个体化治疗方案，并指出未来研究方向。

items.title: Autosomal recessive A20 zinc finger 7 mutation is associated with early-onset lupus-like disease.
items.abstract: A20 is an anti-inflammatory protein that suppresses nuclear factor-κB (NF-κB)-mediated inflammatory gene expression and inhibits cell death. Disruption of A20 function results in defective suppression of the NF-κB pathway, manifesting in diverse autoimmune and autoinflammatory conditions. While autosomal dominant A20 mutations have been identified to cause autoinflammatory disease, recessive A20 mutations causing disease have not been previously described. We utilized whole exome sequencing to identify the variant of interest. In silico structural modeling as well as immunoprecipitation were used to ascertain A20's interaction with linear ubiquitin, coupled with flow cytometric analysis and western blotting to measure the expression of NF-κB activation markers. We quantified NF-κB pathway activity using NF-κB reporter assay. Here, we report a novel homozygous mutation in the A20 protein responsible for early-onset lupus-like disease starting at four years of age. We show that the A20 E781K variant, situated in the seventh zinc finger domain of A20, compromises the protein's ability to bind linear ubiquitin, resulting in a functional hypomorph with a reduced capacity to inhibit NF-κB activation and downstream gene expression in HEK293 cells. Our findings characterize a critical mutation associated with early-onset lupus-like disease in its recessive form and continue to highlight the important role of A20 in maintaining immune homeostasis.

items.titleZh: 常染色体隐性A20锌指7突变与早发型狼疮样疾病相关。
items.abstractZh: A20是一种抗炎蛋白，可抑制核因子-κB（NF-κB）介导的炎症基因表达并抑制细胞死亡。A20功能破坏导致NF-κB通路抑制缺陷，表现为多种自身免疫和自身炎症性疾病。虽然常染色体显性A20突变已被确定导致自身炎症性疾病，但此前尚未描述过导致疾病的隐性A20突变。我们利用全外显子组测序来识别目标变异。通过计算机结构建模以及免疫沉淀来确定A20与线性泛素的相互作用，并结合流式细胞术分析和蛋白质印迹法测量NF-κB活化标志物的表达。我们使用NF-κB报告基因实验量化NF-κB通路活性。在此，我们报告了一个新的A20蛋白纯合突变，该突变导致从四岁开始发病的早发型狼疮样疾病。我们显示，位于A20第七个锌指结构域的A20 E781K变异损害了蛋白结合线性泛素的能力，导致功能低效型，降低了在HEK293细胞中抑制NF-κB活化和下游基因表达的能力。我们的研究结果描述了一个与早发型狼疮样疾病相关的关键隐性突变，并继续强调A20在维持免疫稳态中的重要作用。

items.title: Immune Repertoire Profiling Reveals Distinct Adaptive Immune Signatures of Dampness ZHENG Across Psoriasis, Rheumatoid Arthritis and Ulcerative Colitis.
items.abstract: Autoimmune diseases, including psoriasis (Ps), rheumatoid arthritis (RA) and ulcerative colitis (UC), pose significant health burdens worldwide. A more refined classification of these diseases is essential for enabling targeted therapeutic strategies. Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) is gaining increasing recognition globally, offering potential insights into disease heterogeneity. In this study, we performed comprehensive T cell receptor (TCR) and B cell receptor (BCR) repertoire sequencing in 59 participants, including patients with Ps, RA, UC and healthy controls. Patients were further stratified into Dampness and non-Dampness groups based on standardized TCM diagnostic criteria. Repertoire composition, clonotype richness, diversity metrics, V gene usage and shared CDR3 patterns were analysed. Machine learning approaches (LASSO, GLM and OPLS-DA) were applied to identify diagnostic biomarkers, followed by validation in an independent cohort. Compared with healthy controls, Ps, RA and UC patients exhibited reduced clonotype richness and diminished TCR/BCR diversity, indicating adaptive immune contraction. Dampness ZHENG-specific alterations were observed, including selective IgK and IgL clonotype richness reduction in Ps with dampness, increased TRA/TRB diversity in RA with dampness, and elevated TRG clonotype counts/read proportions in UC with dampness. Stratification by Dampness ZHENG revealed distinct immune repertoire architectures characterized by increased D50 index, reduced proportions of large clones and preferential V gene usage, including TRAV20, TRAV38-2DV8 and TRAV8-3. Unsupervised dimensionality reduction demonstrated significant separation between Dampness and non-Dampness groups across diseases. A three-gene V-segment model achieved an AUC of 0.804 and 74.7% accuracy in an independent validation cohort, supporting its potential utility as an objective biomarker for Dampness ZHENG. Our findings suggest that TCM-based phenotyping may offer a meaningful approach for subgrouping autoimmune diseases, thereby providing a foundation for more syndrome differentiation-based treatment strategies.

items.title: Autoreactive B cells in systemic lupus erythematosus: insights from integrative multi-omics analyses.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is an autoimmune disease characterized by the emergence of autoantibodies and deposition of immune complexes. SLE presents with heterogeneous multi-organ involvement that varies among patients and its mechanisms have been investigated to facilitate appropriate stratification and treatment selection. Bulk RNA-seq and bulk ATAC-seq have provided important insights into the pathogenesis of SLE; however, these approaches are inherently limited by their reliance on predefined cell subsets and known markers, which can introduce bias and restrict their ability to fully resolve cellular heterogeneity. Recent advances in multi-omics analyses have enabled the investigation of multi-layered information beyond single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) alone and have contributed substantially to elucidating the pathogenesis of SLE. Although the emergence of autoreactive B cells and the production of autoantibodies in SLE are well established, the mechanisms of evasion from negative selection remain unclear. Multi-omics analyses have revealed key aspects of SLE pathogenesis, particularly the expansion of atypical B cells (ABCs), an autoreactive population driven by extrafollicular pathways. Furthermore, beyond transcriptional profiling, multi-omics analysis has emerged as an additional investigative method, which combines scRNA-seq with other modalities. Spatial analyses, for instance, have provided critical insights into the tissue localization and persistence of autoreactive B cells within inflammatory niches in lupus nephritis, suggesting that local microenvironments contribute to treatment resistance. Additionally, B cell receptor (BCR) sequencing has revealed distinctive BCR features in SLE, such as reduced somatic hypermutation, increased repertoire naiveness, and increased immunoglobulin variable region heavy chain gene (IGHV4-34) usage in B cells in bone marrow and affected organs (not only in peripheral blood). Furthermore, emerging multimodal approaches integrating spatial, transcriptomic, and epigenomic information further highlight pathogenic cell-cell interactions and inflammatory circuits that cannot be captured by scRNA-seq alone. In this review, we summarize recent multi-omics studies that elucidate the origin, differentiation, and tissue localization of pathogenic B cells in SLE. We provide an overview of the multi-omics analyses focusing on B cells so far, especially at single-cell resolution, and discuss their possible applications in precision medicine.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮中的自身反应性B细胞：来自整合多组学分析的见解
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）是一种以自身抗体产生和免疫复合物沉积为特征的自身免疫性疾病。SLE表现为异质性多器官受累，不同患者间存在差异，其机制已被研究以促进适当的分层和治疗选择。批量RNA-seq和批量ATAC-seq为SLE的发病机制提供了重要见解；然而，这些方法固有地依赖于预定义的细胞亚群和已知标志物，这可能引入偏倚并限制其完全解析细胞异质性的能力。最近多组学分析的进展使得能够研究超越单细胞RNA测序（scRNA-seq）本身的多层信息，并为阐明SLE的发病机制做出了实质性贡献。尽管SLE中自身反应性B细胞的产生和自身抗体的产生已明确，但逃避阴性选择的机制仍不清楚。多组学分析揭示了SLE发病机制的关键方面，特别是非典型B细胞（ABCs）的扩增，这是一种由滤泡外途径驱动的自身反应性群体。此外，除了转录组分析外，多组学分析已成为一种额外的研究方法，它将scRNA-seq与其他模式相结合。例如，空间分析为狼疮肾炎中自身反应性B细胞在炎症微环境中的组织定位和持续存在提供了关键见解，表明局部微环境有助于治疗抵抗。此外，B细胞受体（BCR）测序揭示了SLE中独特的BCR特征，例如体细胞高频突变减少、库幼稚性增加以及骨髓和受累器官（不仅限于外周血）中B细胞免疫球蛋白可变区重链基因（IGHV4-34）使用增加。此外，新兴的多模态方法整合了空间、转录组和表观基因组信息，进一步突出了scRNA-seq无法捕获的致病性细胞-细胞相互作用和炎症回路。在这篇综述中，我们总结了最近的多组学研究，这些研究阐明了SLE中致病性B细胞的起源、分化和组织定位。我们概述了迄今为止聚焦于B细胞的多组学分析，特别是单细胞分辨率下的分析，并讨论了它们在精准医学中的可能应用。

items.title: Updates on endothelial injury in dermatomyositis: Clinical correlations and potential mechanisms.
items.abstract: Dermatomyositis (DM) is a systemic autoimmune disorder with significant heterogeneity. Recent studies have shown that clinical manifestations associated with vascular damage, such as edema, ulcers, severe capillary microcirculation disturbances, and muscle ischemia, are associated with more severe diseases. The risk of cardiovascular diseases in patients with DM is significantly higher than in healthy individuals. Increasing evidence suggests that vascular endothelial cell (EC) injury may occupy a central position in vascular injury in DM and is associated with disease activity. Experimental evidence suggests that EC damage and phenotypic transformation contribute to skin and muscle involvement, as well as pulmonary fibrosis. Further research is needed to elucidate the mechanisms of EC damage, which will help identify more effective biomarkers and develop more targeted therapies.

items.titleZh: 皮肌炎内皮损伤的最新进展：临床关联与潜在机制
items.abstractZh: 皮肌炎（DM）是一种具有显著异质性的系统性自身免疫性疾病。近期研究表明，与血管损伤相关的临床表现，如水肿、溃疡、严重毛细血管微循环障碍和肌肉缺血，与更严重的疾病相关。DM患者的心血管疾病风险显著高于健康个体。越来越多的证据表明，血管内皮细胞（EC）损伤可能在DM的血管损伤中占据核心地位，并与疾病活动性相关。实验证据提示，EC损伤和表型转化参与皮肤和肌肉受累以及肺纤维化。需要进一步研究阐明EC损伤的机制，这将有助于识别更有效的生物标志物并开发更具针对性的治疗方法。

items.title: Systemic lupus erythematosus complicated by thrombotic microangiopathy with atypical HUS features: A case report.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE)-associated thrombotic microangiopathy with features of atypical hemolytic uremic syndrome (aHUS) is a rare but life-threatening complication. Early recognition is challenging because of its overlapping clinical manifestations with other thrombotic microangiopathies. A 49-year-old man with SLE presented with anemia, thrombocytopenia, and multi-system involvement. Despite initial immunosuppressive therapy, his hematologic parameters progressively deteriorated, with hemoglobin decreasing to 89 g/L and the platelet count to 54 × 109/L. Laboratory investigations demonstrated elevated lactate dehydrogenase (501 U/L) and markedly increased soluble complement membrane attack complex (sC5b-9, >1790 ng/mL). ADAMTS13 activity was normal (75.41%), excluding thrombotic thrombocytopenic purpura. Based on the clinical and laboratory findings, the patient was diagnosed with SLE-associated aHUS. Following the diagnosis, the patient received eculizumab, a monoclonal antibody targeting complement component C5. Within 6 days of eculizumab treatment, hemoglobin increased to 102 g/L, and the platelet count recovered to 108 × 109/L, indicating a rapid hematologic response. This case highlights that aHUS can occur as a severe complication of SLE, even in male patients. Complement-mediated thrombotic microangiopathy may coexist with and be triggered by immune hemolysis in SLE. Early recognition and prompt complement inhibition with eculizumab can produce an ultra-rapid hematologic response and may be critical for improving patient outcomes.

items.title: Expression and mutation characteristics of mitochondrial genes in PBMCs of SLE patients: Implications for SLE pathogenesis.
items.abstract: This study aimed to investigate mitochondrial gene mutations and expression in peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) patients, focusing on MT-ND5, and assess expression changes under lipopolysaccharide (LPS), tumor necrosis factor-α (TNF-α), and dexamethasone stimulation. Peripheral blood was collected from female SLE patients. Mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) from PBMCs was sequenced using the HiSeq PE150 platform. Quantitative reverse transcription PCR and western blotting were used to evaluate mRNA and protein expression of the most frequently mutated mitochondrial genes. Cultured PBMCs were treated with LPS, TNF-α, or dexamethasone to examine regulatory effects. A total of 589 mtDNA mutation sites were detected in SLE patients. Among 13 protein-coding genes, MT-ND5, MT-CYB, MT-CO1, MT-ND4, and MT-CO3 exhibited the highest mutation frequencies. Expression analysis revealed significantly reduced mRNA and protein levels of these genes in SLE PBMCs compared with controls, with further decreases after stimulation with LPS, TNF-α, or dexamethasone. SLE PBMCs display extensive mitochondrial mutations and downregulation of key genes, particularly MT-ND5. Inflammatory and therapeutic stimuli exacerbate this suppression, suggesting mitochondrial dysfunction contributes to SLE susceptibility and progression.

items.titleZh: SLE患者PBMCs中线粒体基因的表达和突变特征：对SLE发病机制的意义
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在探讨系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）患者外周血单个核细胞（PBMCs）中线粒体基因突变和表达，重点关注MT-ND5，并评估在脂多糖（LPS）、肿瘤坏死因子-α（TNF-α）和地塞米松刺激下的表达变化。收集女性SLE患者的外周血。使用HiSeq PE150平台对PBMCs的线粒体DNA（mtDNA）进行测序。采用定量逆转录PCR和蛋白质印迹法评估突变频率最高的线粒体基因的mRNA和蛋白表达。培养的PBMCs分别用LPS、TNF-α或地塞米松处理，以检查调节效应。在SLE患者中共检测到589个mtDNA突变位点。在13个蛋白编码基因中，MT-ND5、MT-CYB、MT-CO1、MT-ND4和MT-CO3的突变频率最高。表达分析显示，与对照组相比，SLE PBMCs中这些基因的mRNA和蛋白水平显著降低，且在LPS、TNF-α或地塞米松刺激后进一步下降。SLE PBMCs表现出广泛的线粒体突变和关键基因（尤其是MT-ND5）的下调。炎症和治疗性刺激加剧了这种抑制，提示线粒体功能障碍有助于SLE的易感性和进展。

items.title: The neutrophil percentage-to-albumin ratio predicts mortality in US adults with rheumatoid arthritis: Results from NHANES 2003-2018.
items.abstract: The neutrophil percentage-to-albumin ratio (NPAR), calculated from neutrophil percentage and serum albumin levels, has been proposed as an inflammation-related indicator. Despite increasing interest in NPAR as an inflammatory marker, its prognostic relevance in rheumatoid arthritis (RA) remains insufficiently understood. The objective of this study was to investigate the prognostic relevance of NPAR in US adults with RA, particularly regarding all-cause and cardiovascular mortality, and to evaluate the prognostic performance of both NPAR and the neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio. Data were obtained from the National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES) 2003-2018. RA status was identified according to participants' self-reported physician diagnosis, consistent with previous NHANES investigations. NPAR was calculated as neutrophil percentage × 100/albumin concentration (g/dL). Statistical analyses incorporated the NHANES complex survey framework, including weighting, stratification, and clustering procedures. Missing covariate data were addressed using multiple imputation. Associations between NPAR and mortality outcomes were examined using survey-weighted Cox regression models and restricted cubic spline analyses. The analysis included 2060 adults with RA, among whom 484 died during follow-up and 1576 remained alive. All-cause and cardiovascular mortality risks increased across NPAR levels and remained highest in the top quartile after multivariable adjustment. Kaplan-Meier analysis demonstrated significantly reduced survival probabilities among participants in the highest NPAR quartile, except for those with diabetes. NPAR exhibited a positive linear association with risks of all-cause and cardiovascular death in the restricted cubic spline models. Calculated AUCs reached 0.63 for the former and 0.66 for the latter, suggesting modest discriminatory power akin to neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio. NPAR was independently linked to mortality during follow-up in US patients with RA. As a routinely available biomarker, it may have prognostic relevance, although its predictive ability was relatively limited.

items.title: Exploring the cognitive effects of arthritis: A Mendelian randomization study and cross-sectional analysis of NHANES data.
items.abstract: This study aimed to investigate the relationship between cognitive performance and the pathogenesis of osteoarthritis (OA) and rheumatoid arthritis (RA), emphasizing the role of plasma metabolites and proteins. Using National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey 2011 to 2014 data, cognitive functions of participants aged >60 years were evaluated, examining their correlation with OA and RA. Covariates, including demographics and health-related factors, were included. Genetic causality was determined using Mendelian randomization with single-nucleotide polymorphisms from the UK Biobank and other datasets. Linkage disequilibrium score regression and colocalization analyses were performed to validate genetic correlations and identify shared genetic variants. Cognitive performance was assessed in 387 and 237 OA and RA patients, respectively, compared with 1569 controls. OA patients had significantly lower Consortium to Establish a Registry for Alzheimer's Disease-4 cognitive scores (odds ratio [OR]: 0.962, P = .001), while RA patients had lower digit symbol substitution test scores (OR: 0.980, P = .001). Mendelian randomization revealed a negative causal association between cognitive performance and OA (OR: 0.767, P = .001) and RA (OR: 0.712, P = .006). Plasma components, including bone sialoprotein 2, NKP44, and the metabolite X-11478, were causally linked to cognitive performance. Mediation analysis identified mediators, including FGR and 6CKine. Linkage disequilibrium score regression revealed a genetic correlation between cognitive performance and OA and RA, with colocalization analysis identifying shared genetic factors. GDF5 and TRAIP were associated with OA, and EHMT2 with RA. Cognitive factors, influenced by plasma components, may influence OA and RA onset. This relationship highlights the need for integrated interventions targeting cognitive function and joint health.

items.titleZh: 探索关节炎的认知效应：一项孟德尔随机化研究和NHANES数据的横断面分析
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在探讨认知表现与骨关节炎（OA）和类风湿关节炎（RA）发病机制之间的关系，强调血浆代谢物和蛋白质的作用。利用2011年至2014年国家健康与营养调查数据，评估了年龄>60岁参与者的认知功能，并检查其与OA和RA的相关性。纳入了协变量，包括人口统计学和健康相关因素。使用来自UK Biobank和其他数据集的单核苷酸多态性，通过孟德尔随机化确定遗传因果关系。进行了连锁不平衡评分回归和共定位分析，以验证遗传相关性并识别共享的遗传变异。分别对387名OA患者和237名RA患者进行了认知表现评估，并与1569名对照进行比较。OA患者的阿尔茨海默病登记联盟-4认知评分显著较低（比值比[OR]：0.962，P = .001），而RA患者的数字符号替换测试评分较低（OR：0.980，P = .001）。孟德尔随机化显示认知表现与OA（OR：0.767，P = .001）和RA（OR：0.712，P = .006）之间存在负向因果关系。血浆成分，包括骨唾液酸蛋白2、NKP44和代谢物X-11478，与认知表现存在因果关联。中介分析识别了中介因子，包括FGR和6CKine。连锁不平衡评分回归显示认知表现与OA和RA之间存在遗传相关性，共定位分析识别了共享的遗传因素。GDF5和TRAIP与OA相关，EHMT2与RA相关。受血浆成分影响的认知因素可能影响OA和RA的发病。这一关系强调了针对认知功能和关节健康的综合干预的必要性。

items.title: Distinct cytokine and chemokine alterations in bronchoalveolar fluid from patients with systemic juvenile idiopathic arthritis associated lung disease (SJIA-LD).
items.abstract: Lung disease associated with systemic juvenile idiopathic arthritis (SJIA-LD) remains poorly understood. Evaluation of bronchoalveolar lavage fluid (BALF) may better reflect disease pathogenesis. The objectives of our study were to measure levels of cytokines and chemokines in BALF and their associations with clinical features and treatment in patients with SJIA-LD. Children with SJIA-LD undergoing clinically indicated diagnostic bronchoscopy were enrolled. Comparator BALF was collected from patients with other chronic inflammatory and non-inflammatory lung diseases. BALF was assayed for IL-6, 8 and 18, S100A8/9, S100A12, sCD25, CCL11, CCL17, CCL25, MMP7, and CXCL9. BALF was obtained from 21 patients with SJIA-LD and 54 comparator patients with other lung diseases. Compared to all controls, children with SJIA-LD had a significant elevation of IL-18 (median (IQR) 1406 (722.3-2812) vs 37.2 (25.3-70) pg/mL, p < 0.0001), S100A8/9 (4745.3 (3003-11506) vs. 1297.5 (260-7755) ng/mL, p = 0.02), sCD25 (31.6 (19-50.3) vs. 13.6 (8.6-37.3) pg/mL, p = 0.04), MMP-7 (18,466.7 (10,462.2-33,516.1) vs. 13.645 (8.6-37.3) pg/mL, p = 0.0384), and CCL17 (0 (0-63.1; p = 0.038) vs 0 (0-0) pg/mL. BALF IL-18 was significantly higher in children with SJIA-LD compared to all control subgroups (inflammatory and non-inflammatory airway disease, autoimmune pulmonary alveolar proteinosis, and poorly controlled asthma), in patients who were actively treated with anti-cytokine biologics (N = 9), and in patients who ultimately underwent hematopoietic stem cell transfer (N = 8). Patients receiving anti-cytokine biologics also had significant elevations in several other cytokines compared to patients without such treatments, while profiles in those treated with JAKi (N = 14) were largely similar. Linear regression analysis showed an association between BALF level of IL-18 and the number of immunosuppressive medications utilized (p = 0.0167), but not with O2 requirement, dose of anakinra or prednisone, plasma IL-18, ferritin, CRP or ESR. Patients with SJIA-LD showed a distinct BALF cytokine profile, including significant IL-18, S100A8/9 protein, sCD25, and CCL-17 elevation. The level of IL-18 was higher in patients who required more immunosuppressive medications and were actively treated with anti-cytokine biologics. The relationship between BALF cytokine profiles and anti-cytokine biologics and JAK inhibitors is unclear and should be evaluated further.
